steps.title: Find the subject
steps.content: The subject of the main clause is "an artificial intelligence," which is singular. The descriptive phrase about absorbing and redistributing energies does not change the subject's number.

steps.title: Match singular agreement
steps.content: B and D use plural auxiliary verbs, and C uses a plural/base verb form. Each disagrees with the singular subject. The sentence needs a third-person singular present-tense verb. The answer is A.
